content:
Phase 3.5 – Public marketplace + auth-gated actions + professional UI dialogs

Current status:
- Publishing works
- Listings appear in "My Equipment"
- Home feed is not behaving as intended
- Dialogs/alerts look basic and not production-ready

Goal:
Improve marketplace visibility, enforce auth-based restrictions, and upgrade dialogs to a professional UI/UX level.

========================
Part 1 – Public Marketplace
========================

1. Ensure the Home screen shows all active equipment listings publicly
- Fix any incorrect filtering/query issues
- Ensure it reads from the correct `equipment` collection
- Ensure listings are NOT blocked by auth state
- Only show valid public listings (e.g. isActive = true)

2. Search behavior:
- Text search must work without login
- If map browsing exists → keep it public
- If not → do NOT implement it in this phase

========================
Part 2 – Auth-Gated Actions
========================

Unauthenticated users CAN:
- Browse listings
- View equipment details (basic info)

Unauthenticated users CANNOT:
- Contact provider
- See phone/contact info
- Start booking/payment

If user is not logged in:
- Disable or hide protected actions
- Show a professional prompt:
  Title: "تسجيل الدخول مطلوب"
  Body: "يجب تسجيل الدخول أولاً لإكمال هذا الإجراء."

Logged-in users:
- Keep current behavior unchanged

========================
Part 3 – Professional Dialog UI (IMPORTANT)
========================

Current dialogs are plain and not acceptable for production.

Upgrade ALL dialogs/alerts to look modern and premium:

Requirements:
- Rounded corners (borderRadius noticeable, not sharp)
- Soft shadow (3D feel)
- Proper padding and spacing
- Buttons with rounded edges (not sharp rectangles)
- Buttons styled with primary/secondary colors (not default system look)
- Clean typography and alignment (especially RTL Arabic)

Examples:

Delete dialog:
Title: "حذف المعدة"
Body: "هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد حذف هذه المعدة؟ لن تتمكن من التراجع بعد الحذف."
Buttons:
- "إلغاء" (secondary style)
- "حذف" (danger style, highlighted)

Login required dialog:
Title: "تسجيل الدخول مطلوب"
Body: "يجب تسجيل الدخول أولاً لإكمال هذا الإجراء."
Buttons:
- "إلغاء"
- "تسجيل الدخول"

Error dialog:
Title: "خطأ"
Body: "تعذر إكمال العملية حالياً. حاول مرة أخرى."

Implementation notes:
- If current code uses basic Alert API → replace it with a custom modal/dialog component
- Create a reusable dialog component (minimal, no heavy refactor)
- Ensure consistency across the app

========================
Part 4 – Fix Home Feed Bug
========================

1. Inspect:
- Home screen query
- Filters used
- Parsing logic

2. Compare with actual Firestore data:
- ownerUid
- isActive
- images
- createdAt

3. Add temporary logs:
- number of items fetched
- parsed items
- any errors

4. Fix root cause ONLY (no refactor)

========================
Constraints
========================

- DO NOT refactor the app
- DO NOT break:
  - login
  - registration
  - add listing
  - Cloudinary upload/delete
  - Firestore structure
- Minimal, safe changes only
- Keep existing architecture

========================
Return
========================

1. Root cause of home feed issue
2. Files changed
3. What was fixed in query/rendering
4. How auth-gating was implemented
5. Dialog UI improvements (technical + visual)
6. Confirmation that nothing else broke
